candidates.title: @viennaphilharmonic Angebot
candidates.description: 2 more days until our Summer Night Concert 2026 We recommend getting to the Summer Night Concert by bike or via public transportation. We do not recommend coming by car due to very limited availability of parking spaces. Arrive early, as access may be limited once capacity is reached. The gates open at 5 PM Admission is free of charge, no ticket required! The concert starts on June 19th at 20:45 🎶💫🎻🤗 #schönbrunn #classicalmusic #vienna #thingstodoinvienna Quelle: TikTok @viennaphilharmonic.

candidates.title: @tobi.eulerrolle Angebot
candidates.description: A swimming spot in Vienna that feels unreal👇🏻 Kaiserwasser is one of those places where the city suddenly becomes quiet. You are still in Vienna, close to the skyline and the U1, but surrounded by water, trees and soft summer light. It’s a free natural swimming spot on a side arm of the Old Danube — perfect for a slow afternoon, a picnic by the water or a sunset swim. 📍Kaiserwasser, Vienna Save this for your next summer day in Vienna. . . . . #vienna #wien #summerinvienna #thingstodoinvienna
